name: chart-line-multiple
visual_summary: A chart-line-multiple component displays multiple line charts on a single canvas, suitable for visualizing trending data over time. It's ideal for dashboard applications where multiple data sets need to be compared. Developers can use it to create a detailed and interactive data visualization.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-line-multiple
Description: A chart-line-multiple component displays multiple line charts on a single canvas, suitable for visualizing trending data over time. It's ideal for dashboard applications where multiple data sets need to be compared. Developers can use it to create a detailed and interactive data visualization.
Style: e.g. dark, modern, material-ui
Interactions: e.g. hover, clickable, animated
Tags: data visualization, chart, dashboard

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
